name: molecular adaptor activity
description: "The binding activity of a molecule that brings together two or more molecules through a selective, non-covalent, often stoichiometric interaction, permitting those molecules to function in a coordinated way." [GOC:mtg_MIT_16mar07, GOC:vw]

name: protein-macromolecule adaptor activity
description: "An adaptor activity that brings together two or more macromolecules in contact, permitting those molecules to function in a coordinated way.
